methods.description: Measurement of Mixed Liquor Suspended Solids (MLSS) and Mixed Liquor Volatile Suspended Solids (MLVSS) in sludge and wastewater (influent and effluent) according to standard analytical methods.

steps.description: For monitoring the biomass concentration, MLSS and MLVSS, it was measured according to the Standard Methods for the Examination of Water and Wastewater [22].
steps.searchable_summary: Measure MLSS and MLVSS in sludge and wastewater according to Standard Methods.

methods.description: Measurement of physical characteristics of Aerobic Granular Sludge (AGS), including Sludge Volume Index (SVI), granulation rate, and average particle size, using established methods.

steps.description: The sludge volume index (SVI), granulation rate and average particle size measurements were carried out using the method explained by de Kreuk et al. [23] and Long et al. [14] for granules physical characteristic analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: Measure SVI, granulation rate, and average particle size of AGS using specified methods.

methods.description: Determination of the strength of AGS granules by measuring the integrity coefficient.

steps.description: Other parameter such as granular strength was also determined, by measuring the integrity coefficient [3].
steps.searchable_summary: Measure granular strength of AGS using the integrity coefficient method.

methods.method_name: AGS Morphology and Structure Examination (Stereo Microscope)
methods.description: Periodic examination of the morphology and structure of developed AGS using a stereo microscope equipped with a digital image analyzer.

steps.description: In the case of AGS characterization, the morphology and structure of the developed AGS was examined periodically by using a stereo microscope equipped with digital image analyser (Olympus SXZ7).
steps.searchable_summary: Examine AGS morphology and structure using a stereo microscope with digital image analysis.
outputs: Stereo microscope images of AGS morphology and structure

methods.description: Observation of the microstructure compositions within cultivated AGS granules using Scanning Electron Microscopy (SEM), including sample preparation steps.

steps.description: The granules were prepared according to Ab Halim [3]...
steps.searchable_summary: Prepare AGS granules for SEM according to specified protocol.

steps.description: ...before platinum sputter coating for 60 s (Q150R S, Quarum, UK) was applied as a pre-treatment procedure for SEM image.
steps.searchable_summary: Apply platinum sputter coating to prepared AGS granules for SEM.

steps.description: While, the microstructure compositions within the cultivated granules was observed using scanning electron microscope (SEM) (JSM-J800F, JEOL, Japan).
steps.searchable_summary: Observe AGS granule microstructure using SEM.
outputs: SEM images of AGS granule microstructure
